testcase.name: verifyNavigationMenuItems

failure.message: Lists differ at element [1]: Products !=  Products expected [ Products] but found [ Products]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Lists differ at element [1]: Products !=  Products expected [ Products] but found [ Products] at tests.SmokeTest.verifyNavigationMenuItems(SmokeTest.java:52) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames
